12332222.title: lay back and watch liara grow

choices: The pampering continues, and Liara gets quite lazy.
The pampering continues, and Liara can't get enough of Prothean cuisine.
(Free choice, in case you want another scenario for T'sovik)
12333.content:
"Alright, we'll get your paperwork all sorted out and you'll be discharged, Miss T'soni," the Asari doctor said brightly as he scrolled through the data on her omni-tool.

"Thank the Goddess," Liara muttered, albeit gratefully considering she would at last escape this dreary hospital. She couldn't imagine how it must have been for Shepard to spend months in a hospital bed with her innards barely held together, after the Crucible explosion. Liara had only been here for a week and she was starting to feel a bit stir-crazy.

"Now, you'll need to stay off your feet and leave the cast-shielding on for a month or so until your legs are fully repaired," the doctor explained, gesturing towards the hard-light constructs functioning as casts for her mangled legs. "I assume you have transportation home?"

"Yes she does."

The doctor gave a start as the Prothean spoke up, revealing himself after entering the room stoically and patiently waiting behind her.

"Javik!" Liara pushed herself off the bed, wincing slightly. The doctor stood there, shocked at the sight of the legendary alien species as he walked up to her bedside, resting their foreheads against one another in a show of affection. "Have things been busy?" Liara asked as they broke apart.

"Yes, I've hunted down the individual responsible for the shuttle accident and inflicted vengeance upon him," Javik reported. "His suffering was legendary and it can be assured he will not make that mistake again."

There was a deadly silence as the doctor turned pale. Javik's stoic expression cracked into a slight smile.

"I'm kidding."

Liara giggled as the poor doctor breathed a sigh of relief. At long last, the Prothean had developed a sense of humor, albeit a dark one.

"Right, I'll...go get you discharged. And find the wheelchair..." the doctor said, hastily making her exit.

"Thank you, by the way," Liara said as her giggling came to an end.

Javik looked puzzled. "What did I do?"

"Reminded me of how much I missed you."

Javik, deeply touched, reached out to take her hand as she held it out. The Prothean wasn't one to wear his feelings on his shoulder, but the remarkable gentleness of his hand in hers betrayed his feelings. He might as well have been singing love songs on the roof of the hospital.

"And....you're sure there won't be any lasting damage?" Javik asked wearily.

"None so long as I stay off my feet for a while. I'll be back to sitting behind my desk in no time."

"Ah, so this is the stage of 'pampering' then."

Liara raised an eyebrow, looking puzzled.

"The 'pampering'," Javik explained. "I was speaking with the wild human Jack, and she insisted that while you are recovering I should and I quote, 'pamper' you. Setting you in a comfortable position, preparing you meals, activities to that effect."

"Of course she said that," Liara chuckled. "So you're actually going to cook for me then?"

"You would be surprised," Javik said. "Now that my service as an Avatar of Vengeance is unnecessary I've found I had plenty of free time to devote to such recreational activities. In addition, I figured you would appreciate sampling some Prothean cuisine I have knowledge of."

Liara's eyes lit up at the idea of sampling what the ancient Protheans would have eaten. Ever the enthusiast of the ancient culture, Liara's only familiarity with their diets was archeological evidence suggesting their bodies had a higher then average metabolism and needed extra calories to function. Years ago she would have laughed it off if someone suggested she'd be eating what the Protheans ate millennia ago, and yet here she was, being told that's exactly what she'd be doing.

Javik once again cracked a smile. "I figured you would enjoy that."

---

Liara stirred as the light from a Thessian sunrise touched her face. Her legs felt heavy and numb, the light-casts keeping them securely in place as she slept. Cracking open her eyes, she saw the empty spot on the bed where Javik had been.

Pushing herself up to a reclining postion, Liara stretched out her sore back muscles, still recovering from the stiff hospital bed and the first night back on her more comfortable mattress. As the tantalizing thought of a day spent doing absolutely nothing stretched out before her, she caught scent of something on the air. Something delicious.

"Good morning, Liara," Javik announced, shouldering the door open with a tray in his hands.

"Good...morning," the Asari responded, trying to stifle a giggle at the sight of Javik in, of all things, a cooking apron and a chef's hat. She couldn't fault him for being dedicated, that's for sure.

"This is my first attempt at the Prothean cooking," Javik explained as he set the tray down. "I had to improvise as a few spices seem to have gone extinct since the last cycle, but I think I've recreated it as best as possible.

"Well it smells delicious," Liara complimented, looking over the meal. It seemed to resemble the human delicacy of pancakes but visibly thicker, speckled blue and layered like a cake with a red butter-like substance melted on top. Liara took up the silverware and cut herself a piece, eyes widening as the flavor hit her. "Incredible! I want to say it's sweet but...there's a body to it I haven't experienced before, like nothing I've ever tasted. Amazing!"

Javik smiled slightly. "It's one of the simpler dishes I admit, but it has a kick to it that a lot of cuisine from this era lacked. If you'd like, I can make some extra."

"Mmmf...yeth, PLEATHE!" Liara said through a massive mouthful, her cheeks bulging as she nearly reduced the Prothean dish to half. As Javik gave her a quick peck on the side of her face before leaving to make some more, a nagging voice in the back of Liara's head warned her of the dangers of no physical activity combined with a heavy Prothean diet, only to be quickly drowned out by the voice of the Prothean enthusiast screaming in excitement.

This was going to be the opportunity of a lifetime for her, she wasn't going to let fears about a couple pounds spoil that for her.
12333.title: Accidents Happen, You Have to Learn to Accept That

choices: "This food is totally worth getting flabby for."
"Heh...I bet me being bigger means I can eat more."
123332.content:
It had been pouring rain for five days now, a downpour that brought on a rather unpleasant chill and a biting breeze. It was the kind of day that made you want to cuddle up in a blanket and watch a fun movie, and Liara was doing just that. Sure that was what she mostly did anyway thanks to her legs, but the bad weather made cuddling up even more pleasing, especially now that she had someone else to cuddle with. Leaning against Javik's chest as they reclined on the sofa, Liara let out a soft sigh as the last scene of the movie (Citadel, a fairly popular dramatization of Commander Shepard's fight against the rogue Spectre Saren) played and the credits began to roll.

"Interesting..." Javik said thoughtfully. "That was your first mission with Commander Shepard?"

"Mhmm," Liara said soothingly. "Give or take a few details."

"Yes, they seemed to think the Reaper indoctrinating him had been a spaceship," Javik said coolly. "Not to mention they had an...unusual take on your relationship with the Commander."

"I'm sorry if that was awkward," Liara said, remembering the uncomfortable shuffle the two of them shared when the scene featuring a rather charged encounter between Shepard's character and Liara's flashed on screen. It wasn't a surprise of course, the Asari had always been up front about the relationship she had with Commander Shepard, and how after she came back from the dead they just couldn't rekindle that spark and they both moved on. Still, it didn't exactly make seeing a dramatization of herself 'embracing eternity' with her ex any less awkward.

"It was not," Javik confirmed, putting her at ease. "She was poorly cast anyway."

"She was? I thought the actors did well. The man playing Mr. Moreau even confined himself to a wheelchair for the part."

"True..." he said, taking her hand in his. "But I do not believe there is a soul alive who could match your radiance and set the stars alight as you can."

Liara's face immediately flushed at the amorous comment. "That...is so cheesy," she giggled.

"You do not appreciate my...waxing of the poetic, as humans call it?" He drew in closer, and she could practically feel his slow powerful heartbeat.

"Let me put it this way..." Liara said, drawing the Prothean closer and locking lips in a deep, passionate kiss. Javik responded in turn, careful to avoid bumping into Liara's damaged legs, still held in place by the cast shielding. They would be coming off soon though, and frankly she could not wait to be free of them and really "show" her beloved how deeply she appreciated everything he had done for her.

It felt like hours had passed before they finally broke apart; Liara's stomach seemed to think so as it growled at the pair of them.

"Dinner time," Liara announced.

"So it is," Javik confirmed. "Are you perhaps feeling adventurous?"

"You tell me," Liara responded, playfully stroking the side of his face.

"Well Miri," Shepard gasped as her wife kissed up her neck, "well, I'll do it...but I think..ohhh...you need to get bigger..."

Now it was Miranda's turn to look astonished, "Bigger? Jane, I'm almost 200lbs! The only time I weighed more was when I was in my 3rd trimester!"

Jane grabbed her wife's plush stomach, "You mean back when we fucked three times a day?"

Miranda blushed at the memory, "And when I was gaining so fast I couldn't fit into any of my clothes? I couldn't leave the house!"

"And you looked so cute...," Jane pointed out.

"I couldn't see my feet!" Miranda said, "we met Tali and Garrus for dinner and they didn't recognize me I was so fat! My obgyn said I'd gained 80 more pounds than I needed to, that I was the first pregnant woman she'd ever had to put on a diet!"

Jane laughed, "You're turning me on with that talk and you fucking liked it, didn't you?"

Miranda moaned, both at the memory and the way Jane's hand was pressing onto her clit.

"Okay...maybe...I do hate dieting I have to admit and maybe I could put on a few more pounds," Miranda gasped.

"A hundred," Jane insisted, "until you're pressing in at 300!"

Miranda's eyes rolled back into her head. Right now, she'd was fatter than her normal weight by 20lbs, barely fitting into her fat clothes. She liked being more curvy than fat, but thinking about how big she'd been when she'd been pregnant, of the sensation of getting larger and larger and larger....

"Only if you gain a hundred pounds more than me, alright? Whatever I stop at, you go a hundred more!" Miranda gasped, "Jane, will you go up to 400lbs?"

"400lbs...I'll be a pure lardass, people will laugh at me...fuck yes," Jane answered her, her wife collapsing onto her with a smack of fat.

The two made out passionately, Miranda biting her wife's lips and trailing kisses down her chest and pudgy paunch.

"Let's order room service, we've only got three months to get you as fat as possible!" she insisted, "I want you so rolly polly you can't get back into the front door!"

.....

Meanwhile...

Minerva is having some issues! artificial gravity is making the smartest Shepard daughter feel nauseated. The uptight prep goes to the ship nurse and gets some anti-nausea meds that react with her numerous anti-anxiety drugs to completely remove her inhibitions, while dialing her appetite way up and her already faltering metabolism way down!

Big Sis Bully! Sam, the youngest sister, discovers her new flab, just as her big, buff sister Athena walks in. Thorough teasing by the ripped Athena sets Sam off, she's going to hack the nanites keeping Athena fit, resetting them to maker her sister lazy and exceptionally fat!
12411212.title: You fatten up!

choices: The delivery guy isn't cute, because its an Asari
124112121.content:
While their parents were eating room service, and then each other, the Shepard sisters were getting busy.

For the four siblings there were two paired rooms, surprisingly not split up in order of twins. Athletic party animal Athena and modeling slut Julia took one set, while anxious bag of nerves Minerva and stay at home gamer Sam took the other. The first pair took only long enough to put down their bags, shower and slip into clubbing clothes before hitting the ships night spot, but the later were more staid.

Sam had a VR head set and live streaming set up plugged in before the ship's engines were burning, putting out a 10 million + live stream. The life long lean gamer goth was busy shooting simulated zombies by the dozen, not noticing the slight jiggle from the start of a stomach pressing between her leggings and t-shirt, when a knock came on her door. She paused for a moment, apologizing to her watchers and stepped out of frame to open the door.

"Sis...Sis I don't feel so good...," Minerva groaned.

The second oldest and preppiest sister's pale skin was near green. Her long red hair was coming out of its bun and her blue eyes were bloodshot behind her glasses. She rocked unsteadily on her long legs and had a hand pressed tight against her concave stomach.

"Shit Mini, are you alright?" Sam asked, "You look like you're gonna hurl!"

"Oh no, could it have been those breakfast burritos? God no, a bacterial infection like that can go septic in minutes!" the ever anxious genius gasped, "Sam, if I die, tell our Moms I love them and and tell, tell Ashlin Williams I always thought she was cute!"

Minerva's breath started rising into gasps, sending her over generous bosom jostling against her shirt. Despite being spectacularly stacked, the nerd was usually covered to her neck, quite embarrassed at being an E cup, as if it was a betrayal of her uptight, nerdish nature to be so well endowed.

"Well, before you have a heart attack or put my eye out, let's not assume you're dying and get you to the ship's medical office, alright?" Sam told her, cautiously dragging her sister from their suite and down the hall.

It was a fair distance to the nurse station, Sam skipping the long elevators for the stairs. At the end of hauling her sister up them she was a little out of breath, the baby of the family and a shut in, Sam's exercise consisted of staying at home playing games and her diet for the past several months had been the same baked goods heavy fare that had pushed her mom back over the cusp of obesity. Resultingly, Sam was a bit out of condition but focused more on that than how a nascent muffin top separated her leggings from her shirt.

But the nerd managed to get her high achiever sister into the nurse's station before either of them threw up.

"Yes?" the nurse, an ex-military corpswoman who's increasingly curvaceous build was about to pop her uniform, asked eyes widening to see Minerva's green face.

"My sister here is a little *whew*, she's a bit," Sam started, only to be interrupted.

"Dying, oh God, I'm gonna die, please just kill me now so I don't have to suffer!" the anxious redhead gasped.

"Well no, you're probably not going to die, let's get you set down on the table here," the nurse said, leading the willowy young genius to a bed, "I've got two guesses on what this could be so stay here..."

"Oh god, two options?" Mini gasped, "I've got two incurable diseases?"

Sam groaned, "No Mini, don't catastrophe this."

The nurse chuckled, "No, my main guess is you have artificial gravity sickness. It affects some people the first time they're off world, but a pill cures it. The other option is morning sickness from pregnancy."

The pale Mini paled further, "Pregnant? No, I'm a virgin!"

The nurse blinked at the 6', rail thin, E cup bearing girl, "with a body like that?"

"Of course, I'm going to meet the right boy or girl in grad school and we'll get married after a three year engagement and have 2.1 kids and it'll be perfect!," the over planning Mini laid out.

Sam groaned and the nurse wisely took a blood sample instead of answering.

The test soon proved that Mini was merely nauseated by the ezo effect, a common reaction among biotics. Distracted by how the girl then began panicking over her implant's side effects, she gave Minerva the pills to soothe her without asking about what other medications she was on. Thus Mini swallowed her first bimbozine pill without being told of the disastrous, if temporary, side effects.

"I think...I think I feel better," Mini admitted a moment after swallowing, nausea already fading.

"Its fast acting stuff," the nurse told her, drawing some from a larger bottle, "here's enough doses for the rest of the trip to Eden Prime, come back to me if you feel worse, alright?"

"Of course, of course, certainly," the genius said, walking out with her sister.

Minerva's genius brain was a complex interaction of chemicals. The same staggering analytical and research abilities that would give her a doctorate by 22 were also pointed against her, seeing threats and dangers everywhere and driving her into fearful anxiety attacks a few times a day that years of therapy and several drugs barely held in check. But the bimbozine pill quieted all of that terrible anxiousness by the time they reached the stairwell.

"I'm sorry I dragged you up here over a belly ache, in retrospect it seems completely foolish to freak out so much," Mini told her sister, "I don't know why I'm so worried all the time..."

"Hey, its how you're built, wanna split a pizza when we're back in the room?" Sam asked reassuringly.

Normally Mini didn't touch pizza. Not out of some desire to maintain her figure, Mini didn't even think about her stupendous natural beauty, but due to her meds. She barely ate, her absolutely rail thin physique one earned from the hunger suppression of her anxiety pills. But the first reason Bimbozine wasn't commonly prescribed for anxiety became immediately apparent.

"How about two? I'm starving for some reason," Minerva said, stomach growling, "and some breadsticks maybe...be sure to ask if they have jalapeno poppers and mozzarella sticks too!"

"Wow, you must be feeling better. You didn't used to eat that much in a week," Sam laughed.

"Well," Minerva giggled, an odd sound from her, "I'm hungry!"

The second reason Bimbozine wasn't prescribed took effect as they walked down the four flights of stairs between them and the nurse station. Mini's genius brain's hyperactivity began to slow down, the chemicals lulling it into a calm that soon went beyond quelling anxiety. Minerva was already 10 IQ points down from normal by the time they hit the stairs, she lost another point on each of the 40 steps and 10 each on the four landings. All the thoughts and what ifs and plans that swirled around her head went comfortably away, leaving her in a warm, soft lull of a 99 pt IQ.

A soft smile spread across Minerva's face, as the pills continued lowering her inhibitions down to nothing. The ditziness was a temporary effect, her IQ would soon return to normal when she was off the pill...many weeks later.

At their door, Mini began typing in the code on the keypad, only for the light to blare red again and again.

"What the hell is wrong with this?" Minerva glared at it.

"It should be your birth day, right?" Sam asked her.

Mini glared at it, having to think on the number for too long and getting it wrong before the door finally opened. She walked into the room, breezily dancing for no reason and throwing off her customary blazer as she undid her vest.

"You feeling okay, Mini?" her younger sister asked.

"Never better, just a little sweaty. I don't know why I wore all this dumb stuff," the dulled genius smiled, tossing clothes over chairs, "I'm gonna take a shower. Be sure to put an extra order of bread sticks onto that, alright?"

"Ooookaay," the youngest sister asked, "do you want a meat...oh boy..."

Minerva kept stripping, right down past her granny panties and non push up bra. The etherially slender and ludicrously stacked ginger stood totally naked in front of her sister, throwing her long hair out of its bun and casually stroking her plump chest.

"Yeah, I want a lot of meat," Mini said blatantly touching her clit, "I'm gonna be a bit in the shower, but come join me if your bored. I'll try and be out by the time the delivery guy gets here though, all the clerks look soooo cuuuteee...then let's go dancing."

"Go dancing, you?" Sam asked.

"Yeah, I'm bored in this room," the red head yawned, sashaying into her room and walking out with a vibrator, "I'm gonna come a few times and hit the clubs...depending on how cute the delivery guy is..."

Sam could only stare after her, wondering what the hell was going on. But her own stomach grumbled and as she didn't notice the inch of flesh to pinch over what had been a flat stomach, she put in the order....

The delivery guy isn't cute...because its an Asari who's very hot a thick, plump Asari delivers their massive order...and is invited in for a massive tip...

The other sisters: meanwhile, the other sisters are at a nightclub, stumbling into their own weight gain through accident...

1241121211.content:
Shaking her head at her sister's weird change, Sam put in the order.

The youngest Shepard girl was about to head back to her game when she noticed her reflection in the mirror and stopped. Unlike say, Athena and Julia, Sam wasn't particularly vain. She knew she was well above average in looks just due to being skinny and pretty faced but tried to not let it get to her head like they did. However, the new graduate's green eyes bulged at realizing her shirt wasn't meeting her pants.

Sam's trembling fingers started exploring her stomach, marveling at the softness over what had been nothing but flat, unyielding flesh. She wasn't by any standards big, but it was certainly time to up grade her size 2 wardrobe if the luminously pale ring of fat exposed between black legging and t shirt was any indication! Her fingertips traced the inch of growth, from the budding belly to the first hints of lovehandles, Sam's mouth hanging open in awe.

Sam might not have inherited either of her mothers' exotic hair colors, or Miranda's stunning curves or Shepard's muscles, but she'd inherited both their fat fetishes and had known it from an early age. Instead of freaking out like fit Athena or curvy Julia would at the first sign that she had a weight problem building, she could only grin!

"I'm not that skinny anymore, I'm not that skinny," she grinned.

Growing up with a mom who was indisputably the fattest mom at their school and the hottest had probably warped Sam's mind a bit in terms of preferences. When her sisters saw old photos of Miranda, svelte and lean, and laughed, Sam could only marvel at how much better the now overweight milf looked. Of all the sisters she was certainly the biggest mommies girl, having always haunted the kitchen while Miranda baked to lick bowls and spoons.

"That's probably what this is from," she smiled, sticking out her gut to exaggerate its span, "all the junk mom made to deal with missing Mom made her as fat as I can remember, some of it stuck to me! But why now, I've always eaten like this?"

Indeed, Sam had always eaten like a piglet despite her svelte physique. All of the daughters had been big eaters, save for Minerva after she started her meds, and it hadn't stuck to them. Each had inherited a further weakened form of Miranda's defective high metabolic gene, itself taken from one of the eight bikini models who's genetics had been blended into Miranda's body nearly 60 years before. For Miranda it had kept her girlishly thin until she'd gotten pregnant, but once blended with Shepard that gene became even less functional. Although athletic her whole life, Jane was loaded up with fat genes that would have gone active years ago save for the military grade nanites since removed from her system. The daughter's had humming bird metabolisms until they turned eighteen, at which point their metabolic rate began plunging fast.

Athena was protected by her nanites for now and Sam's appetite had been surpressed by her drugs until put on the bimbozine. Julia claimed to be on a diet, that she constantly cheated on despite a lucrative sponsorship, but was at the moment just lucky her already large bust and hips had taken the small amount of weight she'd gained. But once bony Sam was now revealed to be a primary belly gainer who's couch potato and junk food feasting habits were now catching up fast.

"Holy shit this is hot, fuck...," Sam groaned, "I should start doing stuffing videos...wait fuck my video!"

Realizing she'd put her stream on pause, the still thin but growing Sam ran back to her headset and camera rig. There she became quickly wrapped up in apologizing to her viewers, and nearly coming as she saw someone comment on her muffin top, and lost track of time. When a knock came on the suite door she was lost in digital noise...

....

"Ugh, damn human brats," A'dia muttered to herself, trying to ignore the captivating smell of the steaming pizzas weighing down the cart.

Seeing an Asari in a subservient role, that wasn't an image conscious one like waitress or stripper, would have been odd pre war. But the Asari republics had been devastated during the invasion, the blue all female race was just a shadow of itself, its economy only slowly rebuilding and its population barely a third of what it had been. Many had had to take jobs in the now much more prosperous human alliance...and things had changed from there.

A'dia was still a maiden in her first century of life, hoping she could save up, get hitched to a human and get a job back home before she got too noticeably different. For the Asari were changing. Asari maidens were famously slender and svelte, there hadn't been a recorded cases of one being over weight ever, their humming bird metabolisms blitzing through food. As they got older the typical blue woman got somewhat bigger, typically matrons were curvaceous and matriarchs were often spectacularly stacked and thick, some with Krogan blood even having a bit of a belly carefully hidden by shape wear.

But after the war, the Asari had begun to change.

A'dia was only 95 but sported a figure that would have been unthinkable save for a pregnant member of her species twenty years ago. Her black and gold body suit was stretched to the breaking point across thick thighs and child bearing hips, while her very much non flat stomach strained against her belt. Plump, growing breasts were about to pop their D cup top and her double chin was visible unless she looked slight upwards.

Some theorized that it was a sort of species wide stress response, the universally biotic race communally deciding to metaphorically bulk up for Winter after the catastrophic destruction of Thessia. Others said that after the giga deaths, the blue women were hitting a sort of hyper matron stage en mass period of hyper fertility, their bodies bulking up with excess nutrients for childbearing. It was true that fertility rates were higher, the surviving Asari government was becoming increasingly traditional, paying those Asari who pumped out enough babies, and true that the Asari had gone from having one or two kids each to nine or ten, with the new famed high priestess of Nova Thessia Liara T'soni having been continuously knocked up since the end of the war.

But it was also true that pre-war the race had been mostly vegetarian and so many of them were now living in human dominated socities, their bodies poorly prepared to deal with fat, grease, cholesterol and excess sugar that dominated human diets. The weight of the average human woman was beginning to increase post war, as the once dominant pre-war nanite injections had been confined to military use only, but the 15lbs added to humans was nothing compared to the 50 lbs added to the average Asari living in alliance space.

A'dia, thirty pounds fatter than when she'd gotten this job, tried not to drool over the steaming food on her cart. Her uniform was a straight jacket reminding her of a lot of failed diets and skipped workouts, but she was still so damned hungry despite being obviously and blatantly plump. A'dia had grown up on a thankfully un-attacked colony world but had still felt her energy level plummet and her inhibitions dwindle the moment the crucible wave fired off. She, like every other Asari, now had a physical dispensation to put on weight and a mental eating disorder that said why not take one more, live for today.

She was just about to start chowing down when the door opened, letting A'dia's other lack of inhibition be exposed.

"Oh thank God, I was gonna like, die of hunger," Minerva gasped, her voice vapid and her thoughts empty, "come on, wheel it in!"

A'dia's eyes bulged at the modelesque woman wearing only a small towel that did nothing to hide her very long legs and nearly exposed her heavy breasts, long, wet crimson locks hanging nearly to her taut butt. The stunned Asari did as bid, almost slipping on the water droplets falling from Minerva's hair.

"Oh jeeze, I forgot to dry it. Here let me put it up!" the red head said thoughtlessly, taking off her towel and wrapping it around her hair, coincidentally exposing her self totally.

One of the nicest pairs of the galaxy was on full display. Utterly round udders robustly undulating with each breath. The freckled mounds gleaming with moisture. Their small pink nipples extremely erect as soldiers on parade.

Minerva didn't notice A'dia's stare, bending over and shoving a full handful of jalapeno poppers into her mouth.

"Jesus these are fucking good, I need to have more of these," the redhead grinned, grease trapped around her pink lips and talking through a full mouth, "do you want some?"

The pudgy Asari shook her head, eyes focused on the heavy hooters in front of her.

"No, no I'm watching my weight, this is kinda tight..." she said as the slender ginger Minerva kept stuffing herself, finishing off the greasy poppers.

Minerva's flat stomach was starting to bulge, even before the naked redhead sucked down a two liter of soda. She belched and licked her lips, looking the Asari up and down as she pulled the cover off of a meaty pizza.

"It looks good on you," the ex-genius smiled, going to town on the greasy slice, "I'd bet it would look better off you..."

A'dia's mouth went dry, gulping as Mini approached her, the red head closing the door with a biotic push.

"I can't, um, sleep with guests...," the asari gasped as the tall girl's cheeks bulged with food.

"Oh...well, then we won't sleep then," Minerva grinned, convinced of her own cleverness, "Now open up, you look hungry..."

12411212111.content:
"I'm absolutely stuffed," Jane Shepard groaned, leaning back in her chair as far as she could, hand rubbing over the packed dome of her stomach, "I've got to be done."

"No, you've got to do at least another desert," Miranda said to the tall red head, "I want you to outweigh me by the end of this trip and you're starting from a bit of a deficet, worse you've got some muscle tone still."

"Ugh, Miri I'll pop if I eat anymore," Jane moaned, "and this dress might seriously burst!"

The Relaxation had a lot of bars, buffets, cafes and restaurants, but the retired hero and the spy turned house wife were in the highest end and most exclusive tonight, an exquisite fine dining steak house named the Star Steak. Miranda didn't get to go to such establishments that often, although Shepard's military and now diplomatic career paid well they had four daughters to think about and Miranda hadn't been able to work in twenty years. So it was a special occasion, even for vacation...especially as it required fancy dress and their current finery was on its last legs!'

"Jane, that dress has plenty of room. Trust me, I've been an overfed fatty for years, I can judge when a dress is going to blow and it won't happen tonight," Miranda told her, her own blue eyes looking at a desert menu and trying to resist ordering some more desert.

Miranda's own dress was very much in the danger zone. It was a size sequened black, floor length, size 14, Imperial waisted affair, a birth day present eight years earlier. It showed off her always handsome breasts to aplomb, the plunging neckline giving her a near foot of cleavage and the leg slit showing off her still shapely stems, while the loose waist didn't pinch her fupa and gave room for her big hips. Unfortunately, despite it being a "fat day" dress as well as her fancy one, Miranda was fatter than her usual 190lb limit by an additional 16 pounds. The only time she hadn't been in the buffet the last week was when she was fucking her wife and it showed.

Miranda's double chin was now entering its prime, a prominent bulge at every angle. Her breasts could only barely be shoved into her G cups and new stretch marks were showing on her thighs. She was getting a waddle as the heavy limbs rubbed together and the pairs of underwear she could fit into from her luggage were limited to what was under her dress.

So...nothing.

The poor gown was hanging on by a safety pin holding its zipper up, before Miranda had stuffed here already plump paunch round with food. Eating anymore would be torturing herself, while she had an appetite for sure her stomach could only hold so much and she'd really indulged at the buffet while Shepard was taking a nap that afternoon. Jane had had to suck in her gut for the first time to zip up a dress, but Miranda had had to shoehorn her bulk into this number! She was just lucky that her sow of a wife was eating even more than her at dinner!

"Ugh, but they're already looking at me like a freak for ordering so much," Jane complained, rubbing the stomach on the other side of her taut dress.

Jane was dressed in a short, purple, sleeveless velvet gown, cut to show off her legs and fitted tight to her firm abs, a belt holding it tighter. Of course, after chunking up a bit on her last diplomatic mission and then gaining another ten pounds from the last week's munching it fit very tight around her rather bloated belly and Jane's arms had lost a lot of their definition with no exercise, just as her leg muscles had started to soften. She might still be called slim, but Shepard was lean and fit no more and even in the dress noticeably had a bit of a gut going on.

"How do you think I felt? Every event you were at, every soccer game and cross country meet and volleyball game and play and parent conference meeting, I was the fattest one there," Miranda said, "I've spent twenty years standing out like a sore thumb, now I'm just glad someone will make me smaller."

It was true that Miranda had been a statistical anomaly for years, much fatter than the average woman. But the crucible wave had done something to nanites the galaxy over, their ability to regulate fat faltering save for the restricted military models. Over the past couple years the weight of the average human woman had started rising, once consequence free snacking now sticking to filling thigh gaps and thickening bellies. It was quite common to see tighter pants and dresses anymore, maybe if skintight body suits hadn't gone out of fashion humanity would notice its collective fupa and saddlebags but they were growing unseen now.

"Jeeze, I guess its hard to forget how that made you feel," Jane said, sitting up enough to squeeze her wife's hand, "I'm sorry if you ever thought I was flaunting..."

"Jane...every time you flaunted your muscles next to me and I felt big and huge and flabby?" Miranda asked, "I had to fucking bite my lip to not come in public. Me, the most perfect woman in the galaxy, now the fattest cow in the room? Darling, I've been masturbating to that for years ....and now you get to do so too!"

The waitress, a human girl with a uniform just starting to pinch, came over to give the two fatties their considerable bill. Miranda guessed the girl's thoughts were probably being disgusted at the sight of this bulging, over stuffed black haired woman and her slightly chubby spouse, while not noticing her little muffin top in her too tight cocktail gown. Probably judging Miranda for being a whopper, for letting herself go so badly.

Let her.

Miranda had been the fat girl in the room for twenty years, she was used to being judged for her size, just as she'd been used to being judged as ex-Cerberus and a Lawson in the short amount of time post war before she'd gotten unrecognizably fat. Let the waitress judge how much food she was about to order, it did nothing but drive Miranda's arousal yet further to be thought fat! Yes she'd always kept herself beneath 190 before and sometimes gotten down to as much as 160, loss times usually motivated by fat girl moments when she'd failed to keep up with her fit, athletic family and felt too bad about how the weight weighed her down. But now with her daughter out of the house and her jock wife a cream puff to be, Miranda could grow as much as she wanted!

And right now, Miranda wanted to grow something bad.

"are you all ready for the check?" the waitress asked, trying not to stare into the ivory depths of Miranda's snowy white cleavage.

"A glass of champagne each, an order of berries and cream for me, three slices of carrot cake for my lovely ginger lady," Miranda responded with a smile.

Jane stared at her as the amazed waitress went away, "Miranda, you said I only had to have one!"

Miranda could only smile, white teeth gleaming like her diamond necklace and ear rings, "Jane, Jane...you're a fatty now and fatties don't complain about cake!"

"I'm not that fat...," Jane said half heartedly.

"Something else a fat girl would say....," Miranda teased.

Miranda's eyes proved bigger than her stomach by the time desert came. Jane still had a heavy lifter's appetite, despite her lack of exercise the past few months, and slowly demolished every crumb of the rich cakes. Miri meanwhile meandered through her smaller dish, she was truly far too full to really be eating this. During this latest bulk cycle she'd been slack on her own exercise routine beyond a morning jog that was more of a walk really, robbed of strengthening planks, her stomach muscles could barely hold in what she'd had but she'd stopped sucking in by the time the desert had come in!

So when both wives finished their deserts at the same time and a small "pop" and a loud "rip" was heard, both green eyes and blue widened.

"Did, um, my dress pop?" Jane asked.

"Maybe but I know mind did," Miranda blushed, white face going pink, "Um...Jane I can feel a breeze all down my back, I think my whole zipper tore out!"

"Everything going well?" their waitress asked, hoping these two fatties were done eating and that the tip was worth it.

"Um, splendidly," Miranda said with a false smile, "Jane, just get the card please..."

Jane bent to grab her purse, only for a pop of her own to sound as her belt burst. Her stomach surged over the rip in the fabric, soft fat gleaming with meat sweat. The ginger war hero went red as her hair, covering the rip with her purse as she pulled out the card. She gave an extravagant tip and then went to gingerly help Miranda from her seat.

"Is it noticeable?" Miranda asked nervously.

"Um...I can see half of your ass," Jane replied, "Miri, why aren't you wearing underwear?"

"You'll learn soon fatty in training, alright stand behind me, with your arm around me," Miri gulped, "that should hold it up!"

Both blushing women walked like triaged wounded, so stuffed they felt ready to puke at the slightest mishap. Jane was essentially holding up Miranda's strapless dress, the thin fabric having easily torn. Things went decently until the pair, already eye catching made it into the middle of the busy dining room and a waiter stepped on the hem of Miranda's already damaged dress.

Thin fabric tore away, leaving Miranda totally naked from heel to bra. She went red as a beat, covering herself up quickly with her purse, well, what could cover at least, while the room went silent.

"Jane, if I wasn't about to puke I'd want you to fuck me..." Miranda confessed.

1242.content:
19th January, 2185
The Collector base has been destroyed, my ties to Cerberus are cut, and Orianna is secure. My father still searches for the both of us, but I've made sure that he will be on a wild goose chase for a year and a half. Who did he think he was, to make me perfect? He had no idea of the expectation I'd be held to. If only there was a way I could spite him; put a big, glaring splotch on his legacy. For now, I am left to be a vigilante with Shepard and the rest of her crew. It will suffice until I find a new purpose.

Miranda Lawson sat up from the desk in her quarters and went to join Shepard on the bridge. She was up on the command platform, studying the map of the galaxy.

"So, what are we to do next, Commander?" Miranda asked, standing at Shepard's side.

Shepard sighed and brushed her red hair to the side. "Right now, just a few distress signals, a job on Illium, and a few Alliance fetch assignments."

"I suggest that we complete minor work for now, allow the team some easy work while they recover from Omega 4." Miranda said, "Then, later, we can look at bigger ops."

"Sounds fine to me." Shepard said, setting coordinates for the ship. "We'll check out a wreck in the Traverse. Get Thane ready, then grab your gear."

"Right away." Miranda said and strutted back into the elevator.
---------------
A short while later, the team's shuttle was getting close to the planet's surface. Miranda had the briefing information.

"It appears that this ship was owned by a private party, as it lacks any kind of insignia or marking." She read off of her datapad.

"It is strange to see an unaffiliated vessel this deep in the Traverse." Thane commented. "This system is thick with Blood Pack mercenaries."

"That'll be the problem, the Blood Pack are already looting the wreckage." Miranda said, examining the scans.

"We'll need to get as close as possible to the crash, to minimize any damage to the remains." Shepard said, "We're coming in, weapons out!"

The shuttle door opened and the team dropped straight into the hot zone, dropping countless Vorcha and Krogan fighting their way to the wreck. There were a few cases of palladium scattered outside the remains, along with some credits and a few blueprints. Once inside, they searched for the security room to find a log of events leading up to the crash. They found a recording of a conversation logged in the QEC records. The speakers said,

"We've almost reached our destination, sir." The first voice said, "We have avoided the Blood Pack thus far."

"Make sure that you do, Captain." The second warned, "You won't get a second chance."

Miranda's eyes lit with surprise. "That's my father's voice!"

"Was he onboard?" Shepard asked.

"No, all of the casualties were identified, he must have been the one transmitting." Thane concluded.

"Let's keep listening." Shepard said.

"I know sir, we won't disappoint." The captain returned. "You'll get what you need."

"I know that my faith was not misplaced." He paused for a moment. "My daughter has made me wary of betrayal."

"You have a daughter, sir?"

"Two, actually. I never married, however. They were grown in a lab."

"Genetic engineering, eh?"

"Precisely. I bred them to be perfect, in intelligence, endurance, and appearance."

"You wanted them to have the looks to get by in life?"

"That, in addition to their other factors. I can't stand a fat woman, so I gave them great bodies and put healthy habits into their brains."

Miranda crossed her arms. "Judging bastard." She mumbled.

"I'll see you when we get the goods, sir."

"Good, Lawson out." The recording ended.

The team salvaged what items were left and returned to the Normandy. Miranda sat in her quarters playing that one sentence over and over again in her head. I can't stand a fat woman, I cant stand a fat woman... That's it! She thought, He wanted me to be physically perfect. If he hates fat, that means I love it. That's how I'll become imperfect.

She decided to get help from someone, of course, she wouldn't tell them what she was actually doing. That person was,
1242.title: A Distress Signal

12421.content:
There was no one in the galaxy that Miranda trusted more than Shepard. She’d already helped her in the past with her sister without even asking any questions, so if she was going to get anyone’s help with this, it was Shelard. Miranda spent the next several hours coming up with a foolproof explanation for why she wanted to gain weight. It was actually something she was very proud of. Not that it mattered in the end.

“So what you’re telling me is,” Shepard started once Miranda gave her fantastic excuse. “you want to get fat to spite your father?”

“How’d you—”

“I was there.” So it wasn’t entirely foolproof. What is?

“Right…” Miranda cleared her throat and looked towards Shelard’s models, feeling too embarrassed to look her in the eyes. I knew this was a bad idea. I should always trust my instincts.

“I’ll do it.”

Miranda snapped her attention back to Sheparad. “You will? Why?”

Shepard shrugged, not feeling all too sure of the reason herself. “I don’t know, because we’re friends? Do I really need any more reason than that?”

The little half smile Shepard gave her pulled at Miranda’s heart strings, and made her want to kick herself. Of course Shepard would help her. When has she ever not helped her? “Thank you, Shepard. You have no idea how much this means to mean.”

Another shrug, but this time Shepard’s cheeks are tinted red. “Yeah, well…you’re welcome.” A moment of silence follows. “So how exactly do you want me to help you with this?”

'Miranda, I didn't think you swung that way,' Shepard noted.

'Im not gay!' Miranda huffed, 'I just ...need someone I can trust to help me and that person is you. I know you're bisexual, and while you may enjoy this now with luck I'll soon be looking a lot less attractive.'

1243.content:
When embarrassed faced with embarrassment, there are a number of different reactions that people can have. Some people may start to cry, while others will put on a smile and attempt to brush it off.

Jack has one response and one response only. Three guesses, first two don’t count.

“CEREBERUS BITCH!!!” she cried, kicking a worthless piece of scrap metal that dared to lay on the floor of her industrial hidey-hole. “RIP HER SKIN OFF HER PERFECT GODDAMN BODY AND MAKE HER FUCKIN’ EAT IT!!” The entire lower deck was being lit up in the violent blue of biotic powers flaring up. Pipes started to rattle with a nervous apprehension as the engineering team took refuge to the upper levels, not wanting to be around to offer a lightning rod for Jack’s rage. “SHOVE THE GODDAMN COLLECTOR BASE UP HER STUPID FUCKIN’ ASS IF SHE THINKS SHE CAN GET AWAY WITH THIS SHIT!!”

Not but ten minutes earlier, Jack had come up late to grab a dinner tray and take it back down to the hold before anyone tried to talk to her. Just as she stepped into the elevator, she heard a group snickering while reciting some familiar words.

“My soul buuuuuuuurns with a fire of darkness,” said a voice in a deep, facetious tone, barely able to hold back sniggering.
“Keep reading, it gets even better!” That was Miranda! How did she get her poetry?!
“Alright, alright, ahem, ‘quenched only in the pain of loneliness, I hold my breath waiting’, pffffft…” A crowd of voices broke out laughing. Jack exited the elevator, and turned to see a group of crew members reading of a datapad, all while Miranda stood back smirking.
“You wouldn't believe how easy this was to find, and there’s tons more we it came from,” said Miranda, “I guess Little Miss Psycho is a bit more whiny than we thought.”
The group’s laughing was cut short as the clatter of Jack’s tray hitting the floor alerted them of her presence. Jack ran to the elevator faster than you could blink, and felt rage pulsing in her veins as she reached the bottom floor of the Normandy. No one seemed to immediately realize the beast that had awakened, although some said that thought they saw tears in her eye.

---

“SQUEEZE YOU INTO A LITTLE BALL AND PUNT YOU INTO A SUN AND CHOP YOU INTO PIECES AND FEED YOU TO VORCHA AND TAKE YOUR STUPID PERFECT LITTLE FATASS DUMBSHIT-” Suddenly, she stopped dead in her tracks, the room going silent. The sadistic gleam of vengeance-filled revelation painted itself across her face. Fatass, she liked that term with Miranda. Something about the ‘perfect human’ turning into some lardass pig. Something about the destruction of the ‘perfect body’ that she valued so highly. Sounded like a personal punishment for a personal crime. Rage and tears left her mind, only vengeance remained. She wasn’t quite sure how she was going to do this, but she was more positive that it had to be done.

12431.content:
How exactly would she turn Miranda into a giant fatass? Jack's first thought was to walk up to her officer, tie her up, and feed her until Cheerleader was a balloon, but that would no doubt get her in trouble with the Commander. A chill ran up her spine as she thought of what kinda of punishment Shepard would think of in return. Shep had bit of a karma obsession, and Jack knew getting caught would not be worth it. Maybe she could hire a bunch of mercs to kidnap Miranda and do it all for her. But even with an in, Miranda was hard to get to, only alternating between at her desk or going out on combat mission in a most binary way. Why couldn't she just have a pill to spike her drink with to turn Princess Cerby into a blob? No scientist would be crazy enough to help her besides a madman.

         "Mordin!" she cried out, smacking her fist into her palm. Time to find the coot and see if he was down of a little experiment. She ran out of her hold and punched the deck button on the elevator.

         Once on the right floor, she barged at the elevator and made a beeline for the salarian's lab. Opening the door, she saw the good doctor pacing back and forth, mumbling to himself.

         "Perhaps convert to secondary processor? No, nerve connection not sufficient...." he muttered, clearly deep in thought, "Aide in digestion? Nononono, supplements passable....."

         "Eh.... What up doc?" Jack offered awkwardly, disrupting his thought process, "What'cha, uh, working on?"

         "Oh, Subject Zero, surprising," he responded at a breakneck pace, "Attempting to modify human appendix to offer alternative function to remove vestigial status. Sidework. Do you require assistance?"

         "Uh yeah actually, got a little..... uh..... project," Jack felt the words stumble out her mouth. How would she get him to go along with her scheme? "I got a little idea for a nice prank, y'know."

         "Target; Miranda? Questionable 'niceness' involved...." Mordin said, giving Jack a stern look, "Heard of poetry incident. Incorrect of her, payback expected. However, possible Shepard reaction to counter-action, unpleasant...."

         "Bitch deserves to get ejected into a supernova!!" Jack snapped back, "All I want to for you to cook something up to fatten her up for me!"

         Mordin paused, contemplating Jack's idea, his frown melting into a catlike smile.

         "Concept harmless enough, reversible, heart disease from adipose build up easy enough to avoid. Medication difficult to track back...." he paused for a moment longer. "Alright, will pursue operation! Interesting challenge, simpler than organ rewiring.... Return in after hours for product."

         "Hey, thanks doc!" she shouted with almost childish glee, "I guess I owe yah one!"

         She left with a beaming smile on her face, and Mordin began to work.

         Hours later, once everyone went to bed, Jack returned to pick up her tools of revenge. Mordin looked up from his desk when she opened the door, a content smile on his face.

         "Rousing success! Lab results in green!" he said with glee, indicating a pillbox and a bag of powder, "Two components synthesized, necessitating two prong attack. Component one; appetite stimulant. Three effects; increases appetite, converts 95% of calories to fat, and supplements nutrition. 'Junk' food can be eaten constantly, lacking nutrients filled in an replaced. Subject remains perfectly at health. Component two; caloric increaser. Contains contains high amounts of calories, when coupled with component one, almost instantly creates adipose. Additionally, compatible with dextro protien, increase of, ahem, quarian troubles."

         "Okay, lemme get this straight," Jack said, "Pill increases hunger, and lets you get whatever you want without keeling over, just turns food to fat, and the fairydust makes you straight up fat. Give pill, and spike with powder..."

         "Exactly!" Mordin exclaimed, "Simple to use, makes it look somewhat natural. Little to trace. Fun experiment!"

         "Alright, you did good, doc," Jack said, scooping up her newfound toys, "Thanks a bundle, ya quack!"

         She left the lab, and descended the elevator to return to her quarters underneath engineering. Nothing stood in the way of her revenge against Miranda... Time to put her plans into action.
